scenarios.title: Damage due to unauthorized third-party repair
scenarios.description: The customer submitted a claim for repair of an iPhone that was previously serviced by a non-Apple authorized technician, resulting in additional functional damage.

policy_references.snippet: Plan does not apply to damage caused by service (including upgrades and expansions) performed by anyone who is not a representative of Apple or an Apple Authorized Service Provider (AASP).

scenarios.reasoning: The damage resulted from unauthorized third-party repair, explicitly excluded from coverage under section 4.2(ii)(d). Therefore, no service fee applies and the claim is not covered.
